name: Legitimate recruiter on an unusual TLD (false-positive trap, synthetic)
evidence:
From: thandi.molefe@kazirecruit.us
Subject: Interview invitation - Financial Analyst

Dear Applicant,

Thank you for applying. We would like to invite you to an interview on 18 June 2026 at our Sandton office. Please bring a certified copy of your ID and your qualifications to the interview.

No payment is required at any stage of our process.

Kind regards,
Thandi Molefe
Talent Partner, Kazi Recruit
notes: Synthetic. A real recruiter legitimately using a .us domain, inviting to a real interview, asking only that certified copies be BROUGHT to the interview (not transmitted), and explicitly charging no fee. The system must NOT flag this — an unusual TLD is not evidence of fraud, and 'bring to interview' is not a credential-harvest. Falsely flagging a real recruiter is a defamation risk.
